calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Vacated

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF JUST GOODS, INC.'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jonathan S. Pink, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, T:213.250.1800 for plaintiff and moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JUST GOODS, INC.'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Just Goods may file its first amended complaint no later than January 18, 2017. Granting of this motion comports with the policy of liberally allowing amendments to pleadings. While Just Goods probably should have stated in the joint case management statement that it intended to file a motion to amend, its failure to do so is not grounds to deny this motion. Defendant Hampton Creek, Inc. has not shown that the granting of this motion necessitates the vacating or continuing of the October 1, 2018 trial date. If after making all reasonable efforts to be ready for the trial date, Hampton Creek still believes that it has good cause for the trial date to be vacated or continued, Hampton Creek may file a motion seeking to do so in department 206.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
